name: Showcase
about: Share your creation with the community!

labels: showcase

---

## 🎨 Your Creation
Share what you made with Astro-Vysio!

## 📸 Media
- [ ] Screenshot(s) attached
- [ ] Video/GIF attached
- [ ] Link to external media (YouTube, etc.)

## 🎵 Audio Track
- **Track Name:** [if you're comfortable sharing]
- **Artist:** [if applicable]
- **Duration:** [e.g. 3:45]

## 🎛️ Settings & Presets Used
Describe the key settings, presets, or effects you used:
- Style presets: [e.g. "Vaporwave blend with Digital Glitch"]
- Cosmic influence: [e.g. "High, focused on Mars"]
- Custom effects: [any unique combinations]
- Evolution settings: [if relevant]

## 💭 Creative Process
Tell us about your creative journey:
- What inspired this visualization?
- How did you achieve the look/feel?
- Any challenges you overcame?
- What you learned or discovered?

## 🎯 What Worked Well
What features or settings really made this creation shine?

## 💡 Suggestions
Any ideas for improvements or new features based on creating this?

## 📝 Additional Notes
Anything else you'd like to share about your creation!

---

**Thank you for sharing!** Your creativity inspires us and helps make Astro-Vysio better. 🚀
